title: croton fluminensis
intro: Croton fluminensis, also known as the Brazilian croton, is a species of flowering plant in the family Euphorbiaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant compounds, as well as its ability to stimulate digestion and improve circulation. The health benefits of Croton fluminensis include reducing stress, improving skin and hair health, and supporting the immune system. Herbal preparations of the plant include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various health issues and promote overall well-being.
